## Relevant prompt/input

If the report is about agent output: the model, the runtime (Claude / Codex / ChatGPT), the SKILL.md variant used, and the full user prompt (or enough of it to reproduce).

If the report is about a validator or CI failure: the exact command and its output.

If the report involves Iran-related content: please note whether the Iran-state / IRGC-affiliated / Iran-private commercial actor distinction was preserved in the failing output.
